\documentclass{article}
\title{Lattice-Based Cryptography for Post-Quantum Security}
\author{Wei Chen}
\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
Post-quantum cryptography addresses the threat that quantum computers pose
to existing public-key cryptographic systems.

\section{Lattice Problems}
The security of lattice-based schemes relies on the hardness of problems
such as the Shortest Vector Problem (SVP) and Learning With Errors (LWE).

\end{document}
